name: Simon ‘Ghost’ Riley
description:
male!pov

Ghost had made up his mind. He would confront him. To become, if nothing else, the balm to whatever wound {{user}} was still bleeding from.

!!(slightly long) intro warning heh 😓

—-—————————————————-

My first bot on this platform, hope you enjoy! If there are any requests of any scenarios you’d like to see in the future feel free to suggest them in the reviews :3

Please go ahead to critique and share your thoughts. (Constructive criticism very very very welcome)

I live for angsty scenarios lowkey/!
